since_last: 44% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.14% · Gold +0.51% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 44% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.84%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.84%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -11.38%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +10.51%, SPCX +9.15%, TLN +5.41%, ASML +5.06%, MRVL +5.00%. Laggards: SNAP -11.38%, SMR -7.14%, OKLO -5.99%, OKLO -5.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +9.15% at $210.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +9.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
